learnings.text: pnpm + esbuild doesn't follow package.json exports maps correctly — `svelte/internal/client` resolves as a directory path instead of following exports to `./src/internal/client/index.js`. Vite's dev server handles exports maps fine; esbuild-direct code paths need the custom resolveFromProject plugin or equivalent workaround.

SvelteKit's sveltekit() function resolves its plugins lazily — they don't appear in the flat plugin list from Vite's loadConfigFromFile. Detect SvelteKit by checking package.json for @sveltejs/kit dependency, not by scanning plugin names.

Vite's transformIndexHtml fires preTransformRequest on script URLs, which races with the dep optimizer on cold starts → 504 errors. For synthetic HTML (not file-backed) in middleware mode, manually inject @vite/client instead — same pattern Astro uses (vitejs/vite#5061).

The samspace portal iframe has sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-forms" (no allow-popups), so target="_blank" links are silently blocked. Use in-page navigation or embed content in the current frame instead.

The samspace gateway proxies dev servers at /proxy/PORT/path → localhost:PORT/path, stripping the prefix. Apps served through this proxy must use relative URLs or detect the base path from window.location.pathname — absolute paths like /api/foo bypass the proxy and hit the gateway origin. For Vite module imports, inject a dynamic importmap that remaps the Vite base to the proxied path.
